plugins.name: purely-personal
plugins.description: An AI C-Suite for solopreneurs. 8 slash commands wired to BUSINESS-BRAIN.md and 38 operator-grade frameworks. Marketing, Sales, Operations, Cash, and Leadership engines that read your business context and ship real work in minutes.
